title: Synthetic case report of NSCLC
patient: A 62-year-old man presented with cough and weight loss. Imaging showed a right upper lobe mass. Biopsy confirmed non-small cell lung carcinoma. ANC was 2.1 K/uL. He had no prior immunotherapy.

title: Synthetic case report of pneumonia
patient: A 34-year-old woman presented with fever and dyspnea. Chest X-ray revealed lobar consolidation. She was treated with antibiotics and recovered.
